description: Indigenous to Gujarat, known for high milk yield and distinctive convex forehead.
feed_recommendations: Green fodder (NB-21), concentrates, and ample water.
health_notes: Generally resistant to tick-borne diseases. Prone to mastitis if milking hygiene is poor.

description: Originally from Punjab, one of the best dairy breeds in India. Reddish-brown color.
feed_recommendations: Balanced ration of dry fodder (wheat straw), green fodder, and mineral supplements.
health_notes: Resistant to tick-borne diseases. Watch for foot-and-mouth disease (FMD).

description: Similar to Sahiwal but smaller. Deep red color. Good milk yield.
Dual-purpose breed (milk and draft) from the Thar Desert. White or gray color.
feed_recommendations: Thrives on scarce grazing. Supplement with dry fodder.
health_notes: Highly disease resistant and heat tolerant.

description: Premium water buffalo breed from Haryana/Punjab. Jet black with tightly curled horns.
ideal_climate: Humid and hot climates (needs water for wallowing).
feed_recommendations: High-energy diet for milk production. Green fodder, oil cakes.
health_notes: Susceptible to heat stress if wallowing is not provided. Watch for hemorrhagic septicemia.

description: Heaviest Indian buffalo breed. Massive horns that droop.
ideal_climate: Coastal and dry regions of Gujarat.
feed_recommendations: Requires significant fodder intake due to size.
health_notes: Robust but needs good nutrition to maintain health.

description: Known as 'Panch Kalyani' due to five white markings. High milk yield.
feed_recommendations: Green fodder, legumes, and plenty of water.

description: Medium-sized buffalo from Gujarat. Sickle-shaped horns.
feed_recommendations: Standard balanced ration. Efficient feed converter.
health_notes: Hardy breed, good for smaller farmers.

description: Cross between Murrah and Surti. Good milk producer.
Semi-wild breed from Nilgiris. Distinctive long, curved horns.
health_notes: Very hardy, adapted to harsh mountain conditions.

description: From Kutch, Gujarat. Adapted to night grazing.
Copper-colored body. Known for high butterfat content in milk.
Central Indian breed. Sword-shaped horns.
ideal_climate: Hot and dry regions of Maharashtra.
feed_recommendations: Dry fodder with some green supplement.

description: Draught breed from Tamil Nadu. Resembles Hallikar.
Famous draught breed from Karnataka. Known for speed and endurance.
Exotic dairy breed (Scotland). Red and white markings.
health_notes: Susceptible to heat stress and tick-borne diseases in India.

description: Draught breed from Tamil Nadu hills. Red and white speckled.
Exotic dairy breed (Switzerland). Grey-brown color.
health_notes: Better heat tolerance than Holstein but still needs care.

description: Draught breed from Maharashtra. White with black/red spots.
health_notes: Skin secretes oil that protects from heavy rain.

description: Dual-purpose breed from Maharashtra/Karnataka. Resembles Gir.
Exotic dairy breed. Fawn and white color. High butterfat.
Premier draught breed of Karnataka. Long, vertical horns.
Dual-purpose breed from Haryana. White/grey color.
Exotic breed (Dutch). Black and white. World's highest milk producer.
ideal_climate: Cool climates. Needs fans/sprinklers in India.
feed_recommendations: High input: quality green fodder, corn silage, heavy concentrates.
health_notes: Very susceptible to heat stress, ticks, and mastitis.

description: Exotic breed (Channel Islands). Small, fawn-colored.
ideal_climate: Adaptable, handles heat better than HF.

description: Draught breed from Tamil Nadu. Grey/white with dark markings.
Heaviest Indian breed (Gujarat). Dual-purpose. Large, lyre-shaped horns.
health_notes: Resistant to tick fever and contagious abortion.

description: Dwarf breed from Kerala. Very small size.
Draught breed from Bundelkhand. Small, sturdy.
Draught breed from UP (Lakhimpur Kheri). White.
Fast-paced draught breed from Maharashtra.
health_notes: Very hard hooves, rarely needs shoeing.

description: Draught breed from Karnataka/Maharashtra border. Massive build.
Dwarf breed from Karnataka (Western Ghats).
Famous trotting draught breed from Rajasthan.
Draught breed from Narmada valley. Red with white patches.
World-famous dual-purpose breed from Andhra Pradesh. Large, white, muscular.
health_notes: Global breeding stock for beef (Brahman cattle).

description: Draught breed from Tamil Nadu (Jallikattu bulls).
Milch breed from Rajasthan. Triple cross (Sahiwal/Red Sindhi/Tharparkar).
Exotic dairy breed (Denmark). Red color.
Draught breed from Tamil Nadu delta. Small size.
health_notes: Calves are red at birth, turn grey later.

description: Smallest cattle breed in the world (Kerala).
health_notes: Extremely disease resistant (milk has medicinal value claims).
